key_quotes: While the ongoing Russia-Ukraine and Israel conflicts are
payload.mda_summary: The only detectable delta is the removal of a geopolitical risk qualifier referencing the Russia-Ukraine and Israel conflicts, with no new language added. This suggests management quietly dropped a previously disclosed macro/geopolitical hedging clause, which is a marginal de-escalation of stated risk rather than a meaningful signal in either direction. The delta is too sparse — a single partial sentence removed and nothing added — to draw any material conclusion about analyst estimate revision direction. Analysts are unlikely to be underweighting anything based solely on this change.
